tasks.title: Define package layout for shared model code
acceptance_criteria: Model package directory exists at packages/model/src/promptspec_model
Unit test directory exists at tests/unit
Root pyproject.toml configures pytest pythonpath for model package
Implementation readiness document identifies M1 as the entry point

tasks.title: Implement PromptSlot model
acceptance_criteria: PromptSlot exposes key, type, value, condition, priority, source, version, and required fields
PromptSlot validates allowed type values
PromptSlot validates allowed source values
PromptSlot rejects empty key values
PromptSlot defaults match Data_Model.md where applicable

tasks.title: Implement PromptSpec model
acceptance_criteria: PromptSpec exposes id, title, parent_id, slots, strategy, and metadata fields
PromptSpec validates unique slot keys within a spec
PromptSpec accepts null parent_id
PromptSpec preserves strategy values for renderer, validator, and inspector

tasks.title: Implement RenderedPrompt and Span models
acceptance_criteria: Span exposes slot_key, start, end, and text fields
Span rejects negative offsets
Span rejects end values lower than start
RenderedPrompt exposes spec_id, text, and spans fields

tasks.title: Implement MeaningReport
acceptance_criteria: MeaningReport exposes spec_id, schema_version, meaning, uncertainties, and raw_model fields
MeaningReport defaults uncertainties to an empty list
MeaningReport allows raw_model to be omitted or null
MeaningReport rejects non-object meaning values

tasks.title: Implement ValidationReport
acceptance_criteria: ValidationReport exposes spec_id, status, issues, and metrics fields
ValidationReport validates status as pass or fail
Validation issue validates severity as info, warning, or critical
Validation metrics include slot_coverage, conflict_count, critical_over_generation, and meaning_schema_valid

tasks.title: Implement TestReport
acceptance_criteria: TestReport exposes report_id, suite, status, commands, and artifacts fields
TestReport validates suite against supported test suites
TestReport validates status as pass or fail
TestReport defaults commands and artifacts to empty lists

tasks.title: Implement RalphTask
acceptance_criteria: RalphTask exposes id, title, status, source_doc, acceptance_criteria, test_commands, and dependencies fields
RalphTask validates status against pending, in_progress, completed, and blocked
RalphTask rejects implementation tasks without acceptance criteria
RalphTask rejects implementation tasks without test commands

tasks.title: Add JSON schema export for all canonical models
acceptance_criteria: Schema export function returns JSON schemas for all canonical models
Export includes PromptSlot, PromptSpec, RenderedPrompt, MeaningReport, ValidationReport, TestReport, and RalphTask
Generated schemas can be serialized to JSON

tasks.title: Add unit tests for required fields, enums, defaults, and invalid payloads
acceptance_criteria: All canonical model test files exist
Tests cover required fields
Tests cover enum validation
Tests cover default values
Tests cover representative invalid payloads

tasks.title: Create engine module structure
acceptance_criteria: Engine package exposes registry, serialization, resolver, renderer, condition, and validator APIs

tasks.title: Implement slot registry CRUD logic
acceptance_criteria: SlotRegistry supports add, get, update, delete, and list operations

tasks.title: Implement JSON import/export
acceptance_criteria: Slots round-trip through canonical JSON payloads

tasks.title: Implement YAML import/export
acceptance_criteria: Slots round-trip through canonical YAML payloads

tasks.title: Implement parent slot inheritance
acceptance_criteria: Child PromptSpec resolution includes active parent slots

tasks.title: Implement same-key child override
acceptance_criteria: Child slots override inherited parent slots with the same key

tasks.title: Implement deterministic condition evaluator
acceptance_criteria: Conditions support truthy flags, negation, equality, and inequality

tasks.title: Implement priority-based conflict resolution
acceptance_criteria: Resolver chooses higher-priority slots when same-key slots appear at the same level

tasks.title: Implement prompt renderer
acceptance_criteria: Renderer converts PromptSpec slot values into rendered prompt text

tasks.title: Implement span metadata generation
acceptance_criteria: Renderer emits exact source spans for each rendered slot

tasks.title: Implement missing-slot validator
acceptance_criteria: Validator fails when required slots are missing from rendered spans

tasks.title: Implement semantic conflict validator
acceptance_criteria: Validator reports declared active slot conflicts

tasks.title: Implement over-generation validator
acceptance_criteria: Validator fails when rendered prompt adds unsupported text

tasks.title: Implement ambiguity validator
acceptance_criteria: Validator reports ambiguous wording as a warning

tasks.title: Implement rendered-vs-source fidelity validator
acceptance_criteria: Validator fails when span text differs from source slot value

tasks.title: Add resolver, renderer, and validator unit tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover resolver, renderer, and validator behavior

tasks.title: Add one end-to-end engine scenario fixture
acceptance_criteria: Scenario test resolves, renders, and validates a PromptSpec end to end

tasks.title: Define prompt test case schema
acceptance_criteria: PromptTestCase schema validates prompt fixtures

tasks.title: Add fixture directory layout
acceptance_criteria: Scenario fixture directory contains a runnable prompt test case

tasks.title: Implement test case loader
acceptance_criteria: JSON and YAML fixture files can be loaded as PromptTestCase objects

tasks.title: Implement unit suite runner
acceptance_criteria: HarnessRunner supports suite execution by suite name

tasks.title: Implement integration suite runner
acceptance_criteria: HarnessRunner supports integration suite names

tasks.title: Implement scenario suite runner
acceptance_criteria: HarnessRunner runs scenario fixtures end to end

tasks.title: Implement regression suite runner
acceptance_criteria: HarnessRunner supports regression suite names

tasks.title: Implement expected-vs-actual meaning comparator
acceptance_criteria: Meaning comparator reports missing and mismatched keys

tasks.title: Implement TestReport writer
acceptance_criteria: Harness writes TestReport JSON artifacts

tasks.title: Add python harness.py run CLI
acceptance_criteria: CLI can run a suite and print TestReport JSON

tasks.title: Add python harness.py report CLI
acceptance_criteria: CLI can load and print a stored TestReport

tasks.title: Add failing-test report behavior
acceptance_criteria: Failed cases produce report artifacts

tasks.title: Add harness tests with pass and fail fixtures
acceptance_criteria: Harness unit tests cover pass and failure-report behavior

tasks.title: Create FastAPI service structure
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app factory exists under services/api

tasks.title: Add app configuration model
acceptance_criteria: AppSettings exposes local LLM endpoint and storage path

tasks.title: Add SQLite persistence setup
acceptance_criteria: SettingsRepository persists settings through SQLite

tasks.title: Implement /api/prompts/resolve
acceptance_criteria: Resolve endpoint returns a PromptSpec response

tasks.title: Implement /api/prompts/render
acceptance_criteria: Render endpoint returns RenderedPrompt text and spans

tasks.title: Implement /api/prompts/inspect
acceptance_criteria: Inspect endpoint returns a schema-valid MeaningReport

tasks.title: Implement /api/prompts/validate
acceptance_criteria: Validate endpoint returns a ValidationReport

tasks.title: Implement /api/tests/run
acceptance_criteria: Tests run endpoint returns a TestReport

tasks.title: Implement /api/tests/report/{report_id}
acceptance_criteria: Tests report endpoint returns stored TestReport JSON

tasks.title: Implement /api/settings GET
acceptance_criteria: Settings GET endpoint returns AppSettings

tasks.title: Implement /api/settings PUT
acceptance_criteria: Settings PUT endpoint persists AppSettings

tasks.title: Implement /api/ralph/status
acceptance_criteria: Ralph status endpoint returns task and progress data

tasks.title: Implement /api/ralph/check
acceptance_criteria: Ralph check endpoint validates task acceptance/test contract

tasks.title: Add shared error response handling
acceptance_criteria: API has shared JSON error response helpers

tasks.title: Add API integration tests with httpx
acceptance_criteria: httpx integration tests cover prompt, settings, tests, and Ralph endpoints

tasks.title: Add configurable Ollama-compatible client
acceptance_criteria: OllamaClient posts to /api/generate with configurable endpoint and model

tasks.title: Define schema-bound inspection prompt
acceptance_criteria: Inspection prompt requires JSON-only meaning and uncertainties output

tasks.title: Implement local LLM request/response handling
acceptance_criteria: OllamaClient reads string response from generate payload

tasks.title: Implement JSON extraction and validation
acceptance_criteria: Raw model output is parsed as a top-level JSON object

tasks.title: Map valid output into MeaningReport
acceptance_criteria: Valid model JSON maps into MeaningReport meaning and uncertainties

tasks.title: Map invalid/free-form output into schema failure
acceptance_criteria: Invalid model output creates MeaningReport with SCHEMA_VIOLATION uncertainty

tasks.title: Store raw model output in trace logs
acceptance_criteria: LocalLLMInspector writes trace JSON with prompt, raw model output, and MeaningReport

tasks.title: Add mocked LLM tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover mocked Ollama and fake inspector clients

tasks.title: Add one local-manual smoke test script
acceptance_criteria: Manual smoke script can call LocalLLMInspector against local Ollama
